creator: mark@foster.cc
text:
I updated my ports tree yesterday with portsnap.

ghostscript9-nox11 will not compile.

root@dogma:/usr/ports/print/ghostscript9-nox11 # make
===>  Building for ghostscript9-nox11-9.06_8
/bin/mkdir -p /usr/ports/print/ghostscript9-nox11/work/ghostscript-9.06/obj
/bin/mkdir -p /usr/ports/print/ghostscript9-nox11/work/ghostscript-9.06/bin
gmake so-subtarget BUILDDIRPREFIX=so
gmake[1]: Entering directory '/usr/ports/print/ghostscript9-nox11/work/ghostscript-9.06'
gmake GS_XE=./sobin/libgs.so.9.06 DISPLAY_DEV=./soobj/display.dev STDIO_IMPLEMENTATION=c BUILDDIRPREFIX=so GENOPT='' LDFLAGS='-L/usr/local/lib  -pthread'\
 CFLAGS='-O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -DUPD_SIGNAL=0 -I.  -I/usr/ports/print/ghostscript9-nox11/work/ghostscript-9.06/lcms/include  -I/usr/local/include/libpng  -I/usr/ports/print/ghostscript9-nox11/work/ghostscript-9.06/openjpeg/libopenjpeg  -I/usr/ports/print/ghostscript9-nox11/work/ghostscript-9.06/openjpeg  -I/usr/local/include  -Wall -Wstrict-prototypes -Wundef -Wmissing-declarations -Wmissing-prototypes -Wwrite-strings -Wno-strict-aliasing -Wdeclaration-after-statement -fno-builtin -fno-common -DHAVE_STDINT_H=1 -DHAVE_DIRENT_H=1 -DHAVE_SYS_DIR_H=1 -DHAVE_SYS_TIME_H=1 -DHAVE_SYS_TIMES_H=1 -DGX_COLOR_INDEX_TYPE="unsigned long long" -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -DUSE_LIBICONV_GNU -DUSE_LIBPAPER -I/usr/local/include   -DGS_DEVS_SHARED -DGS_DEVS_SHARED_DIR=\"/usr/local/lib/ghostscript/9.06\"   -DA4' prefix=/usr/local\

gmake[2]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/print/ghostscript9-nox11/work/ghostscript-9.06'

 CFLAGS='-O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -DUPD_SIGNAL=0 -I.  -I/usr/ports/print/ghostscript9-nox11/work/ghostscript-9.06/lcms/include  -I/usr/local/include/libpng  -I/usr/ports/print/ghostscript9-nox11/work/ghostscript-9.06/openjpeg/libopenjpeg  -I/usr/ports/print/ghostscript9-nox11/work/ghostscript-9.06/openjpeg  -I/usr/local/include  -Wall -Wstrict-prototypes -Wundef -Wmissing-declarations -Wmissing-prototypes -Wwrite-strings -Wno-strict-aliasing -Wdeclaration-after-statement -fno-builtin -fno-common -DHAVE_STDINT_H=1 -DHAVE_DIRENT_H=1 -DHAVE_SYS_DIR_H=1 -DHAVE_SYS_TIME_H=1 -DHAVE_SYS_TIMES_H=1 -DGX_COLOR_INDEX_TYPE="unsigned long long" -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -DUSE_LIBICONV_GNU -DUSE_LIBPAPER -I/usr/local/include   -DGS_DEVS_SHARED -DGS_DEVS_SHARED_DIR=\"/usr/local/lib/ghostscript/9.06\"   -DA4' prefix=/usr/local\
